goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: T037 proves a valuable integrated happy path, but the original brief remains materially incomplete: advanced inventory management, truthful expiry presentation, cooked-meal demand exclusion, staple/manual-extra/purchased-coverage grocery math, recipe insight/actions, rich purchased intake, batch-aware cooking/substitution/recalculation/leftovers, broader accessibility, and a current full suite are missing.

worker_package.objective: Complete the household inventory-management vertical slice using existing Pantry schema/APIs: product/alias/staple editing; detailed batches; recent/multi-add; location management; full lifecycle/split/combine/undo actions; inactive browsing; filters/sorts/groups; and truthful expiry/storage-history presentation, with focused and rendered evidence.
verify: Focused domain/service regressions for full inventory actions and semantics
Rendered desktop/tablet/mobile management workflow with keyboard, axe, overflow, screenshots, and persistence
Isolated webpack build and old+new Pantry E2E
Disposable migration/database checks and diff integrity
stop_if: Schema or applied migrations must change.
Files outside scope or concurrent Nutrition overlap are required.

evidence: Existing persistence and focused tests prove canonical products, aliases/identifiers, nested locations, batches, events, versions, FEFO, mapping, uncertainty, grocery provenance, intake, cooking, undo, migrations, and security boundaries.
PantryManager lacks product editing, most batch/location actions, inactive views, requested discovery controls, and truthful expiry semantics.
Projected demand includes cooked linked meals; grocery lacks staple/manual-extra/purchased coverage and exclusion controls.
Purchased intake and cooking controls are materially narrower than the brief; leftover selectors also read the wrong nested summary shape.
T037 proves the integrated 400/350/50 happy path, manual/obsolete behavior, intake, confirmed FEFO/history, responsive rendering, axe, build, and disposable migrations.

parallel_safety.rationale: The inventory slice is coupled across domain, transactions, manager, tests, and one browser workflow.

missing_evidence: Complete inventory management and expiry semantics
Recipe/planner demand completion semantics and insights
Full grocery formula/controls and purchased intake fields
Broader accessibility and current full-suite evidence
required_board_updates: Activate T038 Worker exactly from this package.
Require another Judge before selecting later completion slices.
